entries.name: The Crossing — ~8 million New Yorkers torn into Hethrun in one black second; what did it, and is there a way home?
Find your people — brother Akhil and the ~50, scattered across a realm at war; finding them needs a city, news, and leverage
Drift-marked, and known for it — Shake kept his class (a skilled professional); valuable & notable, a thing powers want owned or used; the kept-class secret still hidden (Maerwald half-suspects)

A knife in Hollowford / the web — a Bone-Sayer-brokered campaign decapitating Edmund's line & burning the Greenways (Oslac, the assassin, Wystan's ambush, Edenmoor, maybe Soren); traces WEST to Mossdrowen / House Greldon (GM-truth: Ranulf's bid)
Sworn man of Count Edmund — fealty given; of the Hollowford March, in tension with finding his people, the Crossing, and his own freedom
The line cut down — Edmund stricken, heir Wystan murdered; Aldwin the last of the blood & the next target, holding besieged Hollowford on Shake's promise; relief must come before the keep falls
THE RELIEF RIDE (spine) — forge a relief army (vassal-thanes + the field-host + Halfdan/Crown) and break the Ash-Captain's siege when his host is winter-and-plague-weak
A following gathering at Aldersweir — Shake's cast-out Hollowford folk regroup there; turning the gate-disaster into a base of support
The Coronation Reckoning — the Witan summoned to the Kingsmound; the realm settles at MIDWINTER (by vote or the sword behind it). A deadline on everything; every lord plays for that table

The gathering muster — Shake becoming the man rallying the March: ~40+ lances & a score of horse-bows and growing (Godric, Brunwulf, the Greenways knights); the core & repute to claim the host & bargain with the powers

Claim the field-host at Marlford — the ~800-1,000 penned, broken & fleeced by profiteer-kingpin Coll Cray; no officer-lever survives — claim it from the BOTTOM (the rank-and-file's kin in Shake's column), break Cray's grip, feed the men hope = inherit an army
